name: Blessing Part I
short_description: Blessing Part I is a 2D pixel style horizontal board action adventure game. Players will take on the role of a swordsman 'Luo' who lost everything in the past and embarks on revenge alone. With only a large sword and flesh and blood, they will fight against the twisted creatures in the darkness.
detailed_description:
「When you stand in that sea of flowers, you can find me.」

*The game is made by one person and developed for the first time, with many flaws.

*The student schedule is limited, and the game can only tell the story of the first act. We apologize for any inconvenience caused.

Game Introduction

Blessing Part I is a 2D pixel style horizontal board action adventure game. The story takes place in an fictional dark fantasy world, where kingdoms are corrupt, cults abound, natural disasters continue, and hunger is rampant. It is on the eve of a storm that urgently needs a flame to ignite.

Without magic or miracles, in this world filled with loneliness and despair, to uncover the truth behind the "blessing" of the past, players will take on the role of a swordsman named "Luo" who lost everything in the past and embarked on revenge alone. With only a large sword and flesh and blood, they will fight against the twisted creatures in the darkness. Like the raindrops falling, it falls all the way in the dark and eventually leads to destruction or redemption, finding the flower sea in its heart.

「Hope is the foremost of all calamities, for it prolongs human suffering.」

main features

  • Chapter based classic side scrolling game levels with compact linear map content.

  • Fully hand drawn 2D frame by frame pixel animation.

  • There are over 20 types of enemies and 8 boss battles set up in the game. Stand up again and again and slay the strong enemy.

  • Rich combat system, proficient in using sword skills, props, and styles to build your battles.

  • A mysterious and bizarre dark fantasy style, with an immersive gaming atmosphere.
